item.title: Why is Rapid Fleet Management Services Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 25-Mar, Rapid Fleet Management Services Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, hitting a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹170.20. The stock fell by 1.28%, underperforming both its sector and the broader market benchmarks, reflecting a combination of technical weakness and subdued investor sentiment. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Gajanand International Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 25-Mar, Gajanand International Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, climbing 12.88% to ₹7.45 by 09:20 PM. This surge comes despite the stock's longer-term underperformance relative to the broader market, signalling a potential shift in investor sentiment and trading dynamics. Time: 6 hours ago

item.description: On 25-Mar, Virtual Galaxy Infotech Ltd’s stock price continued its downward trajectory, closing at ₹110.30, down ₹0.85 or 0.76% from the previous session.
